chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-902 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No. 3267/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that despite repeated efforts, petitioners are not in contact with him since long, therefore, he is unable to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Under these circumstances, the instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
